docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY NAIDUS, ELLIOT AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, MING S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2018 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF NAIDUS, ELLIOT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAIDUS, ELLIOT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHU, MING S. THE RIGHT TO HONEST DISCLOSURES CANNOT BE WAIVED BY THE BUYER WITH AN AS-IS CONTRACT. (SEE CIV CODE 1102(C).) BUT HERE I FIND THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT IN FACT AWARE OF THE SEWER TRAP ISSUE IN LIGHT OF HIS UNREBUTTED TESTIMONY THAT THE TENANTS NEVER REPORTED ANY SEWER/PLUMBING ISSUE TO HIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $116.00) SERVED AUG-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, MING S.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. (506). PLAINTIFF ELLIOT NAIDUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MING S.CHU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
